subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from thy Lord, the All-Merciful, the Most Compassionate, that thou mayest rejoice therein and be numbered among them that remember. And when it reacheth thee, take hold of it with strength [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من ربک الرحمن الرحیم لتفرح به و تکون من الذاکرین و اذا بلغک خذه بقوه
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @knowledge; recognition of God, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
